items.name: BgStyle
items.doc:
Windows Composition API backdrop style.
Mica and Acrylic require Windows 11 (22H2+) — silently falls back to Solid
on older OS versions or non-Windows platforms.

items.name: Nav
items.doc: A navigation destination — icon name resolved to codepoint at build().

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new( id:    impl Into<String>, label: impl Into<String>, icon:  impl Into<String>, ) -> Self

items.name: Toolbar
items.doc: A toolbar icon button — icon name resolved to codepoint at build().

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new( id:      impl Into<String>, icon:    impl Into<String>, tooltip: impl Into<String>, ) -> Self

items.name: DslError
items.doc: Rule violations detected at `build()` time — never silent visual failures.

items.name: AppDsl
items.doc:
Validated, sealed shell configuration.
Can only be constructed via `AppDsl::builder().build()`.

items.name: builder
items.signature: pub fn builder(title: impl Into<String>) -> AppDslBuilder

items.name: platform
items.signature: pub fn platform(mut self, p: Platform) -> Self

items.name: nav
items.signature: pub fn nav(mut self, items: Vec<Nav>) -> Self

items.name: status
items.signature: pub fn status(mut self, text: impl Into<String>) -> Self

items.name: toolbar
items.signature: pub fn toolbar(mut self, items: Vec<Toolbar>) -> Self

items.name: window_size
items.signature: pub fn window_size(mut self, width: u32, height: u32) -> Self

items.name: bg_style
items.signature: pub fn bg_style(mut self, style: BgStyle) -> Self
items.doc: Set OS-level window backdrop (Windows 11 only; no-op elsewhere).

items.name: views
items.signature: pub fn views(mut self, ids: Vec<&str>) -> Self
items.doc:
Register ViewSlot ids — validated to match nav ids 1:1.
Optional: if omitted, nav↔view consistency is not checked.

items.name: build
items.doc: Validate all composition rules. Returns sealed `AppDsl` or list of errors.
